relations.subject: Lafresnaye's vanga
relations.evidence: It was uplisted from Least Concern to Near Threatened in 2022 as it is experiencing moderately rapid population decline owing to habitat degradation and loss within its range. The common name for the species is derived from the French ornithologist who described it, Frédéric de Lafresnaye
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
